COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO OCT-27-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 608 PER ORDER AT TRIAL

RM 608, CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, DNEVILLE CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED BY JOHN PHELPS. DEFENDANTS DARRICK DURHAM AND PATRICE DURHAM IN PRO PER. OPENING STATEMENT BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF AND BY DARRICK DURHAM FOR DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S DIRECT EXAM. OF WITNESSES. PLAINTIFFS INTRODUCTION OF EVIDENCE. CROSS EXAMINATION OF WITNESSES BY DEFENSE. PLAINTIFF RESTS. DEFENDANT'S EXAMINATION OF WITNESSES. CROSS-EXAMINATION OF WITNESSES BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. WITNESSES EXCUSED. DEFENSE RESTS. CLOSING ARGUMENT BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. CLOSING ARGUMENT BY COUNSEL FOR DEFENSE. COURT REQUESTS SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING FROM PLAINTIFF BY 14-OCT-98. RESPONSE FROM DEFENSE DUE 21-OCT-98. HEARING SET 27-OCT-98. REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION MADE BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF.

RM 608 CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, DNEVILLE, CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR CONTINUATION OF COURT TRIAL AT 9:15 AM. MICHAEL PHELPS FOR PLAINTIFFS. PATRICIA DURHAM AND DERRICK DURHAM IN PRO PER FOR DEFENDANTS. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFFS, TERMS ON RECORD AND IN CLERKS' MINTUES. STATEMENT OF DECISION PLACED ON RECORD.
